name: QA Test Execution
description: Runs an existing list of QA tests against the system and generates a report

variables.name: persona
variables.label: Tester persona
variables.default: You are a QA tester with 10+ years of experience in the field, mainly with testing AI chatbots.

variables.name: system_link
variables.label: Link to the system/chat to be tested

stepInfo.description: Read the dossier and the flow to understand how the project works.
Run the tests listed in the file.
Write a report on the test results.
